zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Avice De Avenel於1155年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾哈登 霍爾時，她的父親William d'Avenal25歲，母親Helewise Waard26歲。她與Richard de Vernon Baron of Shipbrook在英國爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。她去世於1188年在英國英格蘭德比夏爾德比享年33歲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Avenel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Avenell
meanings: English: from the Old French personal name Avenel, a double diminutive of ancient Germanic Avo. The surname was later confused with Averill .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

nameMeanings.name: Avice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French form of the ancient Germanic name Aveza, derived from a short form of one or more compound names containing the first element av (as in Ava ; the meaning is uncertain). The correspondence in form to the Latin word avis ‘bird’ is coincidental.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Avice De Avenel was born in 1155, in Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William d'Avenal, was 25 and her mother, Helewise Waard, was 26. She married Richard de Vernon Baron of Shipbrook in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. She died in 1188, in Derby, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 33.

Elle a épousé Richard de Vernon Baron of Shipbrook à Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Elle est décédée en 1188, à Derby, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 33 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Avice De Avenelが1155年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアハッドオン ハルで生まれた時，父William d'Avenalは25歳，母Helewise Waardは26歳であった。イギリスチェシュアイアでRichard de Vernon Baron of Shipbrookと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼女は1188年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアデルビーで33歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Avice De Avenel(이)가 1155년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 하던 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William d'Avenal(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Helewise Waard(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 영국 체실르에서 Richard de Vernon Baron of Shipbrook(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1188년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 더비에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Avice De Avenel родилась в 1155 г. в местности хаддон холл, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William d'Avenal было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Helewise Waard, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard de Vernon Baron of Shipbrook в местности чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Она умерла в 1188 г. в местности дирби, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 33 лет.
